character_buff.name: Di Anima
character_buff.description: Loads souls into the gun, imbuing the attack with souls.

effects: Duration: 300 seconds
[Di Anima], [Di Fantasma] shared
Attack Grade +1
Attack Power +50%
Monster Attack Power +50%
[Di Anima]
Skill attribute changes to Psychokinesis
Psychokinesis Penetration +25
Accuracy +25
Shooting Damage Taken +10%
Melee Damage Taken -10%
[Di Fantasma]
Physical Penetration +25
Max Critical +10
Critical Damage +20%
Melee Damage Taken +10%
Magic Damage Taken -10%
Changes to different triggers with each skill use

stances.name: Anima

skills.name: Silar
skills.description: Turns her body into a spirit, instantly moving to a designated point.

effects: On hit: 50% chance to inflict [Panic] on the enemy.
If [Asorbi] is active, use to renew its duration.
If [Asorbi] is at level 5, use to reset the [Concentra] cooldown.
Applies [Spari] to self after moving.
On hit: 50% chance to inflict [Panic] on the enemy.
If [Asorbi] is active, use to renew its duration.
If [Asorbi] is at level 5, use to reset the [Concentra] cooldown.
Applies [Spari] to self after moving.

skills.name: Riposo
skills.description: Drains souls from the target and absorbs them.
skills.target: Max Range 20m / Radius 4m / Max 5 targets (Incapacitated or combat-incapable targets)

effects: On hit: 30% chance to inflict [Death Foreboding] on the enemy.
Using it on an enemy applies [Asorbi] +2 to self.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
If the target is an enemy PCs summon or incapacitated character, applies [Asorbi] +1 to self per target.
If the target is an enemy PCs summon, hitting it inflicts high damage on the summon.
On hit: 30% chance to inflict [Death Foreboding] on the enemy.
Using it on an enemy applies [Asorbi] +2 to self.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
If the target is an enemy PCs summon or incapacitated character, applies [Asorbi] +1 to self per target.
If the target is an enemy PCs summon, hitting it inflicts high damage on the summon.

skills.name: Parade
skills.description: Creates a swamp of ghosts and inflicts continuous damage at the designated point. However, [Malediz] does not stack with [Suhae], [Kul Uden], [Polluted Water], [Taabu].
skills.target: Max Range 15m / Radius 6m / Max 4 targets around the designated enemy

effects: On hit: 30% chance to inflict [Block] on the enemy.
Attacks up to 13 times during the cast.
Recasting during the cast cancels the skill.
Each attack applies skill damage.
The final attack deals increased damage.
Creates a [Swamp of Ghosts] around the target enemy, inflicting [Malediz] on enemies within it.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
Maintains [Asorbi] duration during the cast.
Applies [Asorbi] +2 to self when the cast ends.
[Di Anima]
Skill damage increases up to 2x with more targets hit.
[Di Fantasma]
100% critical hit chance.
On hit: 30% chance to inflict [Block] on the enemy.
Attacks up to 13 times during the cast.
Recasting during the cast cancels the skill.
Each attack applies skill damage.
The final attack deals increased damage.
Creates a [Swamp of Ghosts] around the target enemy, inflicting [Malediz] on enemies within it.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
Maintains [Asorbi] duration during the cast.
Applies [Asorbi] +2 to self when the cast ends.
[Di Anima]
Skill damage increases up to 2x with more targets hit.
[Di Fantasma]
100% critical hit chance.

skills.name: Sparo
skills.description: Launches souls at the designated target at high speed.

effects: On hit: 40% chance to inflict [Critical Wound] on the enemy.
Using it on an enemy applies [Asorbi] +1 to self.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
On hit: 40% chance to inflict [Critical Wound] on the enemy.
Using it on an enemy applies [Asorbi] +1 to self.
Skill damage increases up to 5x based on [Asorbi] level (3x for PCs).
Casting time proportionally increases enemy knockdown distance, knockdown time, and skill damage (max 4x).
Maximum casting time doubles skill damage.
[Asorbi] is renewed on skill cast.
[Di Anima]
At [Asorbi] level 5, skill damage is doubled.
[Di Fantasma]
At [Asorbi] level 5, 100% critical hit chance is activated.
